hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional beautifully landscaped residential yard with fresh sod, stone border, mulch beds, and a pathway, in full sunlight, photorealistic, no people, no text, no logos.
hero.caption_context: Landscaping is visual-first — hero should show a finished project. Reference the Jeff H. 'incredible transformation' review theme — before/after pairs are ideal if available.

gallery.context: Before (bare/overgrown yard) + after (designed landscape with sod/mulch/beds). Caption 'Incredible transformations — start to finish'.
Patio, walkway, retaining wall, or stone feature. Caption 'Hardscape — patios, walls, walkways'.
Fresh sod laid, lines visible. Caption 'Sod — laid tight, rolled, ready'.
Tree removal, stump grinding, or trimming. Caption 'Tree work — removal, stump, trim'.
Sprinkler install or irrigation system. Caption 'Irrigation — zones, timers, coverage'.
Jose Morales personally or his 5-person team. Caption names Jose — 'Jose on every call' reinforces 3-of-4-reviews-name-him pattern.

sections.context: Atlanta / Norcross residential yards; Unsplash OK but prefer real photos

notes: Landscaping is a PHOTO-driven vertical. Before/after pairs are the highest-conversion content. Jose is personally named in 3 of 4 captured reviews — his photo on the team section reinforces owner-operator trust. The 5-person crew + broad scope (design + tree + hardscape + irrigation) means gallery should span service types, not just lawn-focused.
